nodes.name: Claude — VAT Advisory
nodes.notes: Model: claude-sonnet-4-20250514. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in n8n Variables.

parameters.name: Body
parameters.value:
={{ '🇦🇪 VAT Return Prep — ' + $json.company_name + '
Period: ' + $json.period + '
Box 8 (Net VAT): AED ' + $json.box8_vat_payable_or_refundable + '
Filing Deadline: ' + $json.filing_deadline + ' (' + $json.days_to_filing + ' days)
Status: ' + $json.urgency_level.toUpperCase() }}

nodes.name: WhatsApp — CFO
nodes.notes: Twilio WhatsApp. Credentials: HTTP Basic Auth → Account SID as user, Auth Token as password.
